mapper.insert: insert into route_attractions (route_id, attraction_id, visit_order, visit_time, recommended_duration, notes) values (#{routeId}, #{attractionId}, #{visitOrder}, #{visitTime}, #{recommendedDuration}, #{notes})
mapper.update: update route_attractions set route_id = #{routeId}, attraction_id = #{attractionId}, visit_order = #{visitOrder}, visit_time = #{visitTime}, recommended_duration = #{recommendedDuration}, notes = #{notes} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, route_id, attraction_id, visit_order, visit_time, recommended_duration, notes, created_at from route_attractions
